description: A package is returned to the warehouse by the carrier because of an invalid address. The agent needs to process this return.

nodes.task_description: Scan the returned package to identify the original order.
Process a refund for the cost of the items, but not the original shipping fee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent issues a partial refund for the product value only.

nodes.task_description: Restock the returned items into inventory.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory levels for the returned products.

nodes.task_description: Send an email to the customer informing them of the return and refund due to the invalid address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the situation to the customer.
